title: Internal fault when constructing sequence of assignment

features.name: default_nettype none directive
features.description: Code should include the `default_nettype none directive

features.name: logic variable with mixed procedural and continuous assignment
features.description: Code should include a logic variable assigned both in an initial block and via continuous assign statement

features.name: combinational feedback through inverter
features.description: Code should include a wire assigned from an inverter of another wire creating a combinational feedback loop
